Demographic Restrictions: Submissions are restricted to female-identifying and gender-fluid individuals.
Submissions are restricted to people who identify as a person of color, LGBTQ+, disabled, or of a marginalized gender.
Submissions are restricted to people who identify as immigrants or members of a diaspora.
Submissions are restricted to 2SLGBTQIA+ authors and artists.

Notes: Stories " set on a future Earth transformed by new approaches to soil"
